race.comment: SUPRENDRE (5) was quickly back to form beaten 2L over 1400m at Gatton in a 70. That stacks right up and the 1650m suits. She's going to be hard to beat. The veteran THE CATCH (1) finished alongside the above in that contest off a solid effort at Eagle Farm. Has won 4x over this distance and he also gets his chance in this contest. FLYING BAT (2) placed in better grade at Ballina first-up and has a handy 2kg claim. Good enough to keep well onside. NOTABADJACKUP (4) resumes and led and won a 1540m Maiden on the Gold Coast poly by almost 7L on debut. Draws wide, but the market has to be monitored closely with him.
